summary: Iteration 119: Tested 3 responsive UI bug fixes for small mobile screens (375px - iPhone 13 mini). ALL TESTS PASSED. Beneficiaries page tiles render properly without overflow (343px within 375px viewport). Admin Users tab displays filter buttons and user rows correctly with scrollable overflow handling. Orbit visualization in Beneficiary Hub fits within viewport (343px width). Desktop tests (1920x800) confirmed no regressions. Rate limiting (429) triggered during testing but page layout verifications still passed.
passed_tests: Mobile (375px): Beneficiaries page tiles fit within viewport - scrollWidth=375px
Mobile (375px): Beneficiary tiles container width=343px with 16px padding each side
Mobile (375px): Admin Users tab content fits within viewport - scrollWidth=375px
Mobile (375px): Admin filter container width=343px, properly positioned
Mobile (375px): Orbit visualization fits within viewport - width=343px
Mobile (375px): Beneficiary Hub page - scrollWidth=375px (no horizontal overflow)
Login page renders correctly on both mobile and desktop viewports
Estate Tree visualization visible on Beneficiaries page
Succession Hierarchy tiles with Jane Smith visible at desktop width

details: Tiles stack vertically on mobile with flex-wrap
Uses flex flex-col sm:flex-row for responsive layout
Proper padding and gap adjustments for mobile
UserRow component uses flex flex-wrap for mobile
Responsive avatar sizes: w-8 h-8 sm:w-9 sm:h-9
Status bar uses flex-wrap for narrow screens
Compact mode reduces ball size to 36px (from 50px)
Compact mode reduces center node to 50px (from 80px)

UsersTab.js: Line 103: flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 sm:gap-3
Line 120: w-8 h-8 sm:w-9 sm:h-9 responsive avatar
Line 600: overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide for filter buttons
BeneficiariesPage.js: Line 596: flex flex-col sm:flex-row responsive direction
Line 621: flex items-center gap-1 flex-wrap for badges

critical_code_review_comments: All responsive changes follow Tailwind CSS mobile-first approach (sm: prefix for larger screens)
flex-wrap used appropriately to prevent overflow
min-w-0 and truncate classes prevent text overflow
overflow-x-auto with scrollbar-hide provides smooth mobile experience
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive UI fixes verified at 375px and 1920px viewports. Rate limiting (429) is aggressive - reuse auth tokens where possible. OrbitVisualization uses ResizeObserver and isCompact flag for mobile optimization. UsersTab and BeneficiariesPage use Tailwind responsive prefixes (sm:, md:, lg:) for mobile-first design.
